overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a snowy mountain landscape during golden hour. The character walks from a rocky pool area up a snow-covered ridge, traverses mountain peaks with dramatic sunset lighting, and explores ancient ruins in a high-altitude winter environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pool at base of cliff

events.description: exits rocky enclosure into open snowy mountainside

agents.ego_description: walking out of a rocky pool area surrounded by icicles and beginning ascent of snowy slope

entered.detail: dark rock face with hanging icicles forming a natural enclosure
partially frozen water pool at the base of the cliff
dark opening in the rock wall
patchy snow and ice covering the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a narrow rocky enclosure with a frozen pool and icicles hanging from the cliff face. As he walks forward, he exits the sheltered cave-like area onto an open snow-covered slope, transitioning from shadowed enclosure to exposed mountainside.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain ridge with panoramic views

events.description: sun becomes visible over the ridge, casting long shadows and warm golden light

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the steep snowy ridge toward the sunlit peak with swords on back

entered.detail: steep snow-covered mountain ridge forming the main path
bright sun low on the horizon creating dramatic backlighting
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the far distance
leafless pine trees scattered on the mountainside

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep snow-covered ridge with the sun directly ahead, creating a silhouette effect. The landscape opens up to reveal expansive distant mountain peaks under a dramatic sky, with scattered dead trees marking the treeline.

events.description: approaching stone ruins and wooden markers on the mountainside

agents.ego_description: traversing the mountain ridge and descending toward ancient stone ruins

entered.detail: ancient stone wall remains and crumbling structures
tall wooden markers or totems stuck in the snow
sweeping valley view opening up beyond the ridge

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the mountain summit past icicles and dead trees, with the landscape opening to reveal a valley below. The path leads toward ancient stone ruins and mysterious wooden markers, suggesting a transition from pure wilderness to a once-inhabited sacred site.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley path with distant peaks

events.description: light dims as character moves into shadowed valley area with darker clouds

agents.ego_description: walking through the mountain valley surrounded by snow-covered peaks and scattered ruins

entered.detail: narrow passage between towering snow-covered peaks
large boulders and rock formations dusted with snow

segments.scene_description: Moving through the mountain valley, the character explores terrain dotted with snow-covered rocks and scattered dead trees. The lighting shifts to a softer, diffused quality as clouds gather, and the path winds deeper into the mountain pass with towering peaks surrounding the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, frozen enclosure into a vast, high-altitude mountain wilderness that eventually leads to ancient ruins. It begins within a narrow rocky enclosure featuring a frozen pool and hanging icicles, moving forward as the character exits the shadows onto an exposed, snow-covered slope. As the character ascends a steep ridge, the scene opens into an expansive vista of distant peaks under a dramatic sunset that silhouettes the landscape and its scattered dead trees. The path then traverses the mountain summit, shifting from pure wilderness toward ancient stone ruins and mysterious wooden markers that overlook a deep valley. Finally, the camera winds deeper into the mountain pass among snow-covered rocks, while the lighting softens and becomes diffused as clouds gather around the towering surrounding peaks.
